sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
GAME OVER! The alternating hypothesis caused game over. This is very important information. It means that placing Y in the green frame's 3rd slot was wrong and triggered game over.
But wait - this tells me something crucial. The game over happened on the 12th action (placing Y at green slot 3). The first 11 actions were fine. This means:
- Red: O, R, N was correct (first 6 actions)
- Green: p, b was correct (next 4 actions)
- Green slot 3: Y was wrong
So the correct arrangement has:
- Red: O, R, N
- Green: p, b, ?, ?
The remaining colors are M and Y. If Y was wrong at slot 3, then M must go there and Y at slot 4.
So: Green: p, b, M, Y
But wait, the game is over. I need to restart. Let me check if ACTION7 can undo the game over or if I need to start fresh.
Actually, looking at the state more carefully - the board shows all slots are gray again and the palette is restored. So the game over reset the board. This is a fresh start.
Let me try: Red: O, R, N | Green: p, b, M, Y

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Game over on placing Y at green slot 3!
# This means Red: O, R, N and Green: p, b are correct
# Remaining: M, Y for green slots 3,4
# Try: Green: p, b, M, Y (swap last two)
action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 31},   # O
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 22, 'col': 22},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 10},   # R
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 22, 'col': 28},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 24},   # N
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 22, 'col': 40},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 17},   # p
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 22},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 45},   # b
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 28},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 38},   # M
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 34},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 52},   # Y
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 36, 'col': 40},
])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
